options.name: <patterns>
options.description: Patterns for pin names. Patterns include the * and ? wildcard characters and collections of pins

options.name: -filter
options.description: Filters the collection with the specified expression

options.name: -nocase
options.description: Pattern matching is not case sensitive

options.name: -of_objects
options.description: Collection of all pins associated with the specified cells or nets

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Suppresses all error and warning messages generated when the get_pins command is run

options.name: -regexp
options.description: Treats the specified patterns as a regular expression patterns
